growth_records.medium: Chemically defined medium (CDM) with glucose and lactic acid

up.method: Monod affinity constant K_S; no volumetric uptake rate reported

sec.method: Main fermentation product (qualitative); no rate measured

growth_records.cite: Sangha JS et al. Advancing dental biofilm models: the integral role of pH in predicting S. mutans colonization. mSphere (2024). DOI:10.1128/msphere.00743-24. [PMC11774048]
growth_records.snippet: Actinomyces oris Glucose 0.227 7.78 1.40 ... facultative anaerobes that are assumed to consume glucose ... and produce lactic acid as the main product in dental biofilms
growth_records.notes: mu_max = 0.227 h-1 (Table 2), K_S = 7.78 mmol/L (=1.40 g/L glucose). Doubling time calculated: td = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.227 = 3.053 h. Kinetic parameters CITED FROM Sangha et al. 2024, Microbiol Spectr, doi:10.1128/spectrum.03713-23 (ref 17). Modeling paper; no new measured rates.
